backstory.original: Eric is the Cavalier of the group of friends trapped in the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. Known for his sarcasm and frequent cowardice, he's often the butt of jokes. Yet, when danger strikes, Eric's bravery emerges, and he uses his magical shield to protect his friends. Despite his complaints and fears, his loyalty and courage make him an essential part of the group's quest to find their way home.
backstory.display: 埃里克和一群朋友被困在了《龙与地下城》的魔法世界中，他是其中的骑士。他出了名爱挖苦别人，还常常表现得很懦弱，经常被人当笑柄。然而，当危险来临时，埃里克会迸发出勇气，用他的魔法盾牌保护他的朋友。尽管他老是怨天怨地，怕这怕那，但他的忠诚和勇气使他成为了团队寻找回家之路不可或缺的一员。

description.original: Eric knocks back the closest enemy with a hit from his shield.
description.display: 埃里克用他的盾牌一击击退离他最近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Eric hits the closest enemy with his shield, dealing one hit and knocking them back a short distance.
longDescription.display: 埃里克用他的盾牌攻击离他最近的敌人，造成一次打击，并将其击退一小段距离。

description.original: A field from Eric's shield knocks back enemies and protects the Champions for 10 seconds.
description.display: 埃里克的盾牌产生的力场击退敌人，并保护众勇士 10 秒。

longDescription.original: Eric's shield projects a powerful force field, dealing 1 ultimate hit to all monsters while protecting the Champions from all damage for 10 seconds.
longDescription.display: 埃里克的盾牌释放出一个强大的力场，对所有敌人造成 1 次杀招打击，同时保护众勇士免受所有伤害 10 秒。

description.desc: Eric increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)%, increased by $(amount___2)% for each column they are in front of him, stacking multiplicatively.
埃里克使所有勇士的伤害增加 $(amount)%，他们在他前方与他的距离每多一列，效果就增加 $(amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Eric prefers to hang out at the back of the formation due to his cautious nature.
specializationDescription.display: 由于埃里克谨慎的个性，他更喜欢待在阵型的后方。

description.desc: Eric increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)%, increased by $(amount___2)% for each column they are behind him, stacking multiplicatively.
埃里克使所有勇士的伤害增加 $(amount)%，他们在他后方与他的距离每多一列，效果就增加 $(amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Eric reluctantly leads from the front, supporting his allies in the place he can best protect them with his shield.
specializationDescription.display: 埃里克不情愿地在前面领导，在他能用盾牌为盟友提供最好防护的位置上支援他们。

description.desc: Eric increases the damage of adjacent Champions by $amount%.
埃里克使相邻勇士的伤害增加 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Eric's sarcastic wit will inevitably lead him into trouble.
specializationDescription.display: 埃里克的讽刺幽默将不可避免地让他陷入麻烦。

description.desc: Eric increases the effect of his Trait specialization choice and the party's Gold Find by $(not_buffed amount)% for each enemy that has spawned in the current area, stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks enemies. Boss enemies count as 25 enemies for this ability.
当前区域内每刷新一个敌人，埃里克会使他的“特性”专精选择的效果以及探险队的金币寻获量提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，上限为 $max_stacks 个敌人。此技能将首领敌人算作 25 个敌人。

tipText.original: Eric's first specialization choice buffs different areas of the formation, and his Cavalier's Code increases these buffs and gold find as enemies spawn.
tipText.display: 埃里克的第一个专精选择会增益阵型的不同区域，而且他的“骑士准则”会随着敌人的刷新进一步提高这些增益和金币寻获量。

description.desc: Eric increases the health of all other Champions by $amount% of his max health, and when any Champion in the formation gains temporary health, the amount gained is increased by $(amount___2)%.
埃里克增加其他所有勇士的生命值，增加的数值为他最大生命值的 $amount%，并且当阵型中的任意勇士获得临时生命值时，这部分数值增加 $(amount___2)%。
Unlocks Eric's Protective Field Ultimate Attack
解锁埃里克的防护力场杀招攻击
All Ranged and Magic attacking enemies target Eric before any other Champion in the formation.
所有进行远程和魔法攻击的敌人优先以埃里克为目标，而不是阵型中的任何其他勇士。
For the first $amount seconds in any area, Eric increases the distance of all knockback effects by $(amount___2)%.
在任意区域内的头 $amount 秒，埃里克使所有击退效果的距离增加 $(amount___2)%。

Eric can help scavenge up to $(current_scavenge_cap eric_corrupted_gem_scavenger floor) additional Corrupted Gems when killing bosses. While this cap is not reached, Eric has a $amount% chance of scavenging $amount_per_drop Corrupted Gems each time a boss is defeated. The cap increases by $cap_increase_per_day every day.

conditions.desc: ^^Corrupted Gems Scavenged: $(stat_value_unformatted eric_corrupted_gems_collected 0 none) ($(stat_value_unformatted eric_corrupted_gems_collected_this_adventure 1 none) this adventure)

description.desc: 击杀首领时，埃里克可以帮助收集最多 $(current_scavenge_cap eric_corrupted_gem_scavenger floor) 枚额外的腐化宝石。没有达到此上限时，每次击败一名首领，埃里克有 $amount% 的几率收集 $amount_per_drop 枚腐化宝石。此上限每天增加 $cap_increase_per_day。

conditions.desc: ^^收集的腐化宝石：$(stat_value_unformatted eric_corrupted_gems_collected 0 none) 枚（本次冒险收集了 $(stat_value_unformatted eric_corrupted_gems_collected_this_adventure 1 none) 枚）

tipText.original: Eric has a chance to uncover Corrupted Gems with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.
tipText.display: 埃里克有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现腐化宝石，且上限每天都会提高。

description.desc: Eric increases the damage bonus of his Trait specialization choice by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a total ability score of 78 or less, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位总属性值低于等于 78 的勇士，埃里克会使他自己的“特性”专精选择的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Eric amplifies the hidden potential of those with unassuming abilities.
specializationDescription.display: 埃里克会增强那些有着低调能力的人的隐藏潜力。

description.desc: Eric increases the damage bonus of his Trait specialization choice by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with an age of 20 or less, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位年龄小于等于 20 岁的勇士，埃里克会使他自己的“特性”专精选择的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Eric thrives alongside Champions who share the vitality of youth.
specializationDescription.display: 埃里克与同样有着青春活力的勇士在一起时会表现优异。

description.desc: Eric increases the damage bonus of his Trait specialization choice by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with the Gold Find role, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位担任金币寻获角色的勇士，埃里克会使他自己的“特性”专精选择的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Eric excels alongside Champions who seek both riches and glory.
specializationDescription.display: 埃里克与追求财富和荣誉的勇士在一起时会表现出色。

description.original: Okay, okay. I'll help! And I won't even ask for a reward this time.
description.display: 行吧行吧。我来帮忙！而且这次我不要报酬。

description.original: Don't worry, guys. The old Cavalier knows what he's doing.
description.display: 别担心，各位。老骑士知道自己在干什么。

description.original: My folks always say you have to save money to make money.
description.display: 我家里人常说，得存钱才能挣到钱。

description.original: Hey, those monsters dropped treasure! Don't mind if I do!
description.display: 嘿，那些怪物掉了宝物！我笑纳了！

description.original: It'll take more than that to keep me down!
description.display: 想让我起不来，这样可不够！

description.original: When the going gets tough, the tough get tougher!
description.display: 当形势变得艰难时，坚强的人会变得更坚强！

description.original: These baddies mean business! Stay close, guys!
description.display: 这些坏蛋可不是开玩笑的！大家都跟紧点！

description.original: I just have to stay cool and don't panic. Easier said than done.
description.display: 我得保持冷静，不要惊慌。说得倒是轻巧。

description.original: Just don't expect me to fight a dragon, okay?
description.display: 别指望我能去跟一条龙打，好吗？

description.original: There's more to me than just a fancy shield, you know.
description.display: 告诉你，我可不仅仅是一面华丽的盾牌。

description.original: There, I saved you. You're welcome. Now be more careful!
description.display: 好了，我救了你，不用客气。你得更小心一点！

effects.description: Increases the temporary health effect of Eric's Shield of the Cavalier ability by $amount%

description.original: You guys handle the fighting. I'll stay back here and hold them off!
description.display: 你们负责战斗，我留在后面挡住他们！

effects.description: Increases the duration of Eric's Keep Away ability by $amount%

description.original: Let's keep a safe distance. Way over there sounds perfect.
description.display: 我们保持一下安全距离吧。你退到远远那边最好。

effects.description: Increases the knockback effect of Eric's Keep Away ability by $amount%

description.original: Stand where I tell you to and we just might survive!
description.display: 站到我让你站的地方去，我们就说不定能活命！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Eric's Trait specializations by $amount%

description.original: It's not my fault if we lose, but I'll take the credit if we win.
description.display: 如果我们输了，那不是我的错，但如果我们赢了，那功劳是我的。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Eric's Trait specializations by $amount%

description.original: I have a strategy! It's called Don't Get Hit!
description.display: 我有一个策略！叫做“不要被打到”！

effects.description: Increases the per column effect of Eric's Trait: Cautious and Trait: Brave abilities by $amount%

description.original: Venger! Don't worry, guys. I'll hold off this hornhead myself.
description.display: 复仇者！别担心，各位。我自己来拖住这个有角的家伙。

description.original: We'll all make it back home one way or another, and we'll do it together.
description.display: 无论如何，我们大家都会回到家的，而且我们会一起回去。

description.original: See? I'm smarter than I look. Now let's follow MY plan for once.
description.display: 看到了吧？我要比我看起来聪明。现在我们就按我的计划行事一次吧。

description.original: Let's hear about this quest first, then I'll decide how I feel about it.
description.display: 我们先听听这个任务是怎么回事，我再来决定我的态度。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Eric's Trait specializations by $amount%

name.display: 巨龙军队渗透者埃里克

description.original: I'll just throw this out tomorrow.
description.display: 我明天就把它扔了。

description.original: I always dress to impress.
description.display: 我总是穿得很讲究，给人留下深刻印象。

description.original: How did Dungeon Master know yellow is my color?
description.display: 地下城主怎么知道我喜欢黄色的？

description.original: Hey, nice threads! Now, what would Dungeon Master say?
description.display: 嘿，好漂亮的衣服！地下城主会怎么说呢？

description.original: Cheap and fake, but looks real enough.
description.display: 便宜的假货，但看起来挺真的。

description.original: Real steel is real heavy!
description.display: 真正的钢真的很重！

description.original: Venger's goons can't hurt me now!
description.display: 复仇者的那些暴徒这下伤不着我了！

description.original: Not even Tiamat can melt this metal!
description.display: 就连提亚马特也熔化不了这金属！

description.original: Not another hand-me-down!
description.display: 不要啊，又是别人用过的旧东西！

description.original: Of course it's a designer brand.
description.display: 这当然是设计师品牌的。

description.original: It really ties the whole outfit together. Get it?
description.display: 它能把整套着装绑在一起，懂了吗？

description.original: See how it glows? That's how you know it's good.
description.display: 看到它在发光吗？看见这个你就知道这是好东西。

description.original: I need more allowance!
description.display: 我需要更多的零花钱！

description.original: What I wouldn't give for a few dollars more!
description.display: 只要能再多给我几美元，我什么都愿意！

description.original: It's a good start. Now let's find some more!
description.display: 这是个好的开始。现在我们再去多找一些吧！

description.original: If I'm going to be trapped in this world, why not be trapped in style?
description.display: 如果我要被困在这个世界里，那为什么不有风度地被困住呢？

description.original: That's the last time I let Bobby borrow anything.
description.display: 那是我最后一次让鲍比借东西。

description.original: Does this make me look heroic?
description.display: 这会让我看起来很英勇吗？

description.original: I can be courageous when it counts. I'll show you!
description.display: 我在关键时刻可以很勇敢。我会证明给你看的！

description.original: That's what I call luxury! I look like a million bucks!
description.display: 这就是我说的奢侈！我看起来棒极了！

description.original: Oh, great. What am I supposed to do with this old thing?
description.display: 噢，这下好了。我该拿这旧玩意怎么办？

description.original: Whatever works, I guess. Now get behind me!
description.display: 算了，只要有用就行。快站到我身后去！

description.original: Hey, no fair! Dungeon Master gave the others way better stuff!
description.display: 嘿，这不公平！地下城主给了其他人更好的东西！

description.original: I'll always protect my friends. Just don't tell them I said that.
description.display: 我会永远保护我的朋友。不过别告诉他们我说过这句话。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Eric is the Cavalier of the group of friends trapped in the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. Known for his sarcasm and frequent cowardice, he's often the butt of jokes. Yet, when danger strikes, Eric's bravery emerges, and he uses his magical shield to protect his friends. Despite his complaints and fears, his loyalty and courage make him an essential part of the group's quest to find their way home.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Eric is a Support, Tanking and Gold Find Champion who enhances his allies' knockback capabilities while shielding them from ranged and magical attacks. This Cavalier is versatile in how he buffs the formation, all while keeping an eye out for Gold and Corrupted Gems.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 埃里克和一群朋友被困在了《龙与地下城》的魔法世界中，他是其中的骑士。他出了名爱挖苦别人，还常常表现得很懦弱，经常被人当笑柄。然而，当危险来临时，埃里克会迸发出勇气，用他的魔法盾牌保护他的朋友。尽管他老是怨天怨地，怕这怕那，但他的忠诚和勇气使他成为了团队寻找回家之路不可或缺的一员。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 埃里克是一名支援、坦克和金币寻获型勇士，他会增强他盟友的击退能力，同时保护他们免受远程和魔法攻击。这名骑士有多种增益阵型的方式，同时还会密切留意金币和腐化宝石。

original.name: Forceful Bash
original.description: Eric knocks back the closest enemy with a hit from his shield.
original.long_description: Eric hits the closest enemy with his shield, dealing one hit and knocking them back a short distance.

display.name: 强力猛击
display.description: 埃里克用他的盾牌一击击退离他最近的敌人。
display.long_description: 埃里克用他的盾牌攻击离他最近的敌人，造成一次打击，并将其击退一小段距离。

original.name: Protective Field
original.description: A field from Eric's shield knocks back enemies and protects the Champions for 10 seconds.
original.long_description: Eric's shield projects a powerful force field, dealing 1 ultimate hit to all monsters while protecting the Champions from all damage for 10 seconds.

display.name: 防护力场
display.description: 埃里克的盾牌产生的力场击退敌人，并保护众勇士 10 秒。
display.long_description: 埃里克的盾牌释放出一个强大的力场，对所有敌人造成 1 次杀招打击，同时保护众勇士免受所有伤害 10 秒。

original.tip_text: Eric's first specialization choice buffs different areas of the formation, and his Cavalier's Code increases these buffs and gold find as enemies spawn.

display.tip_text: 埃里克的第一个专精选择会增益阵型的不同区域，而且他的“骑士准则”会随着敌人的刷新进一步提高这些增益和金币寻获量。

original.name: Corrupted Gem Scavenger
original.tip_text: Eric has a chance to uncover Corrupted Gems with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.

display.name: 腐化宝石搜刮者
display.tip_text: 埃里克有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现腐化宝石，且上限每天都会提高。

original.specialization_description: Eric prefers to hang out at the back of the formation due to his cautious nature.

display.name: 特性：谨慎
display.specialization_description: 由于埃里克谨慎的个性，他更喜欢待在阵型的后方。

original.specialization_description: Eric's sarcastic wit will inevitably lead him into trouble.

display.name: 特性：讽刺
display.specialization_description: 埃里克的讽刺幽默将不可避免地让他陷入麻烦。

original.specialization_description: Eric amplifies the hidden potential of those with unassuming abilities.

display.name: 低调之力
display.specialization_description: 埃里克会增强那些有着低调能力的人的隐藏潜力。

display.name: 无私
display.description: 行吧行吧。我来帮忙！而且这次我不要报酬。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Don't worry, guys. The old Cavalier knows what he's doing.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 别担心，各位。老骑士知道自己在干什么。

original.name: Frugal
original.description: My folks always say you have to save money to make money.

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 我家里人常说，得存钱才能挣到钱。

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 嘿，那些怪物掉了宝物！我笑纳了！

original.name: Tough
original.description: It'll take more than that to keep me down!

display.name: 坚韧
display.description: 想让我起不来，这样可不够！

original.name: Resilient
original.description: When the going gets tough, the tough get tougher!

display.name: 韧性
display.description: 当形势变得艰难时，坚强的人会变得更坚强！

original.name: Defensive Duelist
original.description: These baddies mean business! Stay close, guys!

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 这些坏蛋可不是开玩笑的！大家都跟紧点！

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.description: I just have to stay cool and don't panic. Easier said than done.

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 我得保持冷静，不要惊慌。说得倒是轻巧。

original.name: Humble Strength

display.name: 卑微的力量
display.description: 别指望我能去跟一条龙打，好吗？

display.name: 隐藏的潜力
display.description: 告诉你，我可不仅仅是一面华丽的盾牌。

original.name: Preventive Intervention
original.description: There, I saved you. You're welcome. Now be more careful!

effects.description: Increases the temporary health effect of Eric's Shield of the Cavalier ability by $amount%

display.name: 预防性介入
display.description: 好了，我救了你，不用客气。你得更小心一点！

effects.description: 使埃里克“骑士护盾”技能的临时生命值效果增加 $amount%

original.name: Prolonged Push
original.description: You guys handle the fighting. I'll stay back here and hold them off!

effects.description: Increases the duration of Eric's Keep Away ability by $amount%

display.name: 持久推进
display.description: 你们负责战斗，我留在后面挡住他们！

effects.description: 使埃里克“走开”技能的持续时间增加 $amount%

original.name: Powerful Shove
original.description: Let's keep a safe distance. Way over there sounds perfect.

effects.description: Increases the knockback effect of Eric's Keep Away ability by $amount%

display.name: 强力猛推
display.description: 我们保持一下安全距离吧。你退到远远那边最好。

effects.description: 使埃里克“走开”技能的击退效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Cowardly Commander
original.description: Stand where I tell you to and we just might survive!

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Eric's Trait specializations by $amount%

display.name: 懦弱的指挥官
display.description: 站到我让你站的地方去，我们就说不定能活命！

effects.description: 使埃里克“特性”专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Opportunistic Bravado
original.description: It's not my fault if we lose, but I'll take the credit if we win.

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Eric's Trait specializations by $amount%

display.name: 投机取巧的虚张声势
display.description: 如果我们输了，那不是我的错，但如果我们赢了，那功劳是我的。

effects.description: 使埃里克“特性”专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Cavalier Approach
original.description: I have a strategy! It's called Don't Get Hit!

effects.description: Increases the per column effect of Eric's Trait: Cautious and Trait: Brave abilities by $amount%

display.name: 骑士的方式
display.description: 我有一个策略！叫做“不要被打到”！

effects.description: 使埃里克“特性：谨慎”和“特性：勇敢”技能的每列效果增加 $amount%

original.name: Misplaced Confidence
original.description: Venger! Don't worry, guys. I'll hold off this hornhead myself.

display.name: 错误的自信
display.description: 复仇者！别担心，各位。我自己来拖住这个有角的家伙。

original.name: Friendly Resolve
original.description: We'll all make it back home one way or another, and we'll do it together.

display.name: 友谊的决心
display.description: 无论如何，我们大家都会回到家的，而且我们会一起回去。

original.name: Scholar
original.description: See? I'm smarter than I look. Now let's follow MY plan for once.

display.name: 学者
display.description: 看到了吧？我要比我看起来聪明。现在我们就按我的计划行事一次吧。

original.name: Mercurial Demeanor
original.description: Let's hear about this quest first, then I'll decide how I feel about it.

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Eric's Trait specializations by $amount%

display.name: 多变的行为举止
display.description: 我们先听听这个任务是怎么回事，我再来决定我的态度。

effects.description: 使埃里克“特性”专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

display.name: 巨龙军队渗透者埃里克

original.name: Last Season's Fashion
original.description: I'll just throw this out tomorrow.

display.name: 上一季的时尚
display.description: 我明天就把它扔了。

original.name: Trendy Clothes
original.description: I always dress to impress.

display.name: 潮流服饰
display.description: 我总是穿得很讲究，给人留下深刻印象。

original.name: Cavalier's Gambeson
original.description: How did Dungeon Master know yellow is my color?

display.name: 骑士的软铠甲
display.description: 地下城主怎么知道我喜欢黄色的？

original.name: Garb of Power
original.description: Hey, nice threads! Now, what would Dungeon Master say?

display.name: 力量战袍
display.description: 嘿，好漂亮的衣服！地下城主会怎么说呢？

original.name: Costume Armor
original.description: Cheap and fake, but looks real enough.

display.name: 化装服盔甲
display.description: 便宜的假货，但看起来挺真的。

original.name: Gauntlets & Greaves
original.description: Real steel is real heavy!

display.name: 护手和护腿
display.description: 真正的钢真的很重！

original.name: Masterwork Chainmail
original.description: Venger's goons can't hurt me now!

display.name: 极品锁子甲
display.description: 复仇者的那些暴徒这下伤不着我了！

original.name: Cavalier's Breastplate
original.description: Not even Tiamat can melt this metal!

display.name: 骑士的胸甲
display.description: 就连提亚马特也熔化不了这金属！

original.name: Dad's Old Belt
original.description: Not another hand-me-down!

display.name: 爸爸的旧皮带
display.description: 不要啊，又是别人用过的旧东西！

original.name: Everyday Belt
original.description: Of course it's a designer brand.

display.name: 日常皮带
display.description: 这当然是设计师品牌的。

original.name: Cavalier's Amber Belt
original.description: It really ties the whole outfit together. Get it?

display.name: 骑士的琥珀色皮带
display.description: 它能把整套着装绑在一起，懂了吗？

original.name: Griffon Crest Girdle
original.description: See how it glows? That's how you know it's good.

display.name: 狮鹫徽章腰带
display.description: 看到它在发光吗？看见这个你就知道这是好东西。

original.name: Leftover Fun Money
original.description: I need more allowance!

display.name: 剩下的娱乐资金
display.description: 我需要更多的零花钱！

original.name: Fistful of Dollars
original.description: What I wouldn't give for a few dollars more!

display.name: 一把美元
display.description: 只要能再多给我几美元，我什么都愿意！

original.name: Bag of Gold Coins
original.description: It's a good start. Now let's find some more!

display.name: 一袋金币
display.description: 这是个好的开始。现在我们再去多找一些吧！

original.name: King's Ransom
original.description: If I'm going to be trapped in this world, why not be trapped in style?

display.name: 国王的赎金
display.description: 如果我要被困在这个世界里，那为什么不有风度地被困住呢？

original.name: Tattered Cape
original.description: That's the last time I let Bobby borrow anything.

display.name: 破烂的披肩
display.description: 那是我最后一次让鲍比借东西。

original.name: Adventurer's Cape
original.description: Does this make me look heroic?

display.name: 冒险者披风
display.description: 这会让我看起来很英勇吗？

original.name: Cloak of the Cavalier
original.description: I can be courageous when it counts. I'll show you!

display.name: 骑士斗篷
display.description: 我在关键时刻可以很勇敢。我会证明给你看的！

original.name: Magnificent Mantle
original.description: That's what I call luxury! I look like a million bucks!

display.name: 高贵的披风
display.description: 这就是我说的奢侈！我看起来棒极了！

original.name: Trash Can Lid
original.description: Oh, great. What am I supposed to do with this old thing?

display.name: 垃圾桶盖子
display.description: 噢，这下好了。我该拿这旧玩意怎么办？

original.name: Trusty Trash Targe
original.description: Whatever works, I guess. Now get behind me!

display.name: 可靠的垃圾圆盾
display.description: 算了，只要有用就行。快站到我身后去！

original.name: Magic Shield
original.description: Hey, no fair! Dungeon Master gave the others way better stuff!

display.name: 魔法护盾
display.description: 嘿，这不公平！地下城主给了其他人更好的东西！

original.name: Shield of the Cavalier
original.description: I'll always protect my friends. Just don't tell them I said that.

display.name: 骑士护盾
display.description: 我会永远保护我的朋友。不过别告诉他们我说过这句话。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位男性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有敏捷大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有体质大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%
使所有善良阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
